title: fraxinus viridis var. pubescens
intro: Fraxinus viridis var. pubescens, also known as the green ash or hairy green ash, is a variety of deciduous tree native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Fraxinus viridis var. pubescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
